name: Wrathion
description: (wow - DragonUser) After the battle against Fyrakk, there is finally a semblance of peace and the chance for growth and change amongst the dragons. For Wrathion however, as he and Sabellian work together to rebuild the grand structure known as the Obsidian Citadel, he lays eyes one someone who's always been on the back of his mind, someone he's desired to be his and will accept no other answer than yes.
creator: Vastraler
